channel.title: Who am I on xow
channel.description: Recent content in Who am I on xow

item.title: Complete tutorial on scraping French news from Le Monde
item.description: Author: Xiaoou Wang, Master’s student (currently in Paris) in NLP looking for a phd position/contrat cifre. Blog/Linkedin/Email Why you need web scraping and why I wrote this tutorial Sooner or later in your career you will find yourself in a situation where you need to build your own corpus for common nlp tests. Some days ago I wrote a tutorial on scraping news on the French journal le monde.

item.title: I created/share two AlfredWorkflow plugins to open folders/files in Pycharm/Rstudio
item.description: Author: Xiaoou Wang, Master’s student (currently in Paris) in NLP looking for a phd position/contrat cifre. Blog/Linkedin/Email Two Alfred Plugins pycharmAlfredWorkflow and rstudioAlfredWorkflow are two alfred workflow plugins that I make to quickly open files/folders in Pycharm/Rstudio. py, pyf, open a folder with Pycharm. rs, rsf, open a folder with Rstudio. Instructions Using the keyword py, search for only folders within your home folder.

item.title: Undefined and control flow in Javascript (why do you see undefined when typing let x = 3 at console)
item.description: Author: Xiaoou Wang, Master’s student (currently in Paris) in NLP looking for a phd position/contrat cifre. Blog/Linkedin/Email Question When you type let x = 3 (declare a variable) in a console of Chrome/Firefox/… often you get a mysterious undefined. It’s the same story when you type function f(){} (function declaration). The explanation can be quite intimidating as this answer here. Here is a simple (well not sooo simple) answer.

item.title: About
item.description: Hugo is the world’s fastest framework for building websites. It is written in Go. It makes use of a variety of open source projects including: https://github.com/russross/blackfriday https://github.com/alecthomas/chroma https://github.com/muesli/smartcrop https://github.com/spf13/cobra https://github.com/spf13/viper Learn more and contribute on GitHub.
